en.atmosphere: Isumi line ghost station. 10 daily passengers. 112-min commute. Remote agricultural ghost town. Zero food data.
en.landmarks: No notable landmarks. Last train 21:22 (very early). Elevation 19m. Agricultural ward with minimal infrastructure.
en.food: Data absent - scrapers couldn't reach this far. Plan for self-sufficiency.
en.nightlife: Minimal. Dead after 8pm. Residents drive elsewhere for anything.
